title: 50m / 25m Roll Luxury Organza Woven Edge Ribbon Reel Rolls 3mm, 9mm, 15mm, 25mm, 40mm (Lilac, 25mm x 25 Metres)
features: Premium Quality Luxury Organza Sheer Woven Edge Ribbon Rolls

Available in a range of vibrant colours - Choose from Baby Blue, Baby Pink, Black, Brown, Dark Green, Fuchsia, Gold, Ivory, Light Green, Lilac, Navy Blue, Orange, Red, Royal Blue, Silver, Turquoise, White & Yellow
These high quality ribbons are perfect for making bows, gifts, wedding invitations, cake decorating, arts & crafts, floristry, scrapbooks etc!
description: Product Description 50m / 25m Roll Luxury Organza Woven Edge Ribbon Reel Rolls 3mm, 9mm, 15mm, 25mm, 40mm Available in 18 Vibrant Colours & 5 Sizes! Premium Quality Luxury Organza Sheer Woven Edge Ribbon Rolls Available in widths of 3mm, 9mm, 15mm, 25mm and 40mm Available in a range of vibrant colours - Choose from Baby Blue, Baby Pink, Black, Brown, Dark Green, Fuchsia, Gold, Ivory, Light Green, Lilac, Navy Blue, Orange, Red, Royal Blue, Silver, Turquoise, White & Yellow These high quality ribbons are perfect for making bows, gifts, wedding invitations, cake decorating, arts & crafts, floristry, scrapbooks etc! Supplied neatly on a roll Perfect for a range of uses including: Gift Wrapping Party Decoration Balloons Cake Decorations Card Craft & so much more! Available in 18 Vibrant colours! Choose from Baby Blue, Baby Pink, Black, Brown, Dark Green, Fuchsia, Gold, Ivory, Light Green, Lilac, Navy Blue, Orange, Red, Royal Blue, Silver, Turquoise, White & Yellow - You will be sure to find the perfect colour for your needs!
